_meta.note: Illustrative weather profiles for the capstone's two pilot districts (Bugesera, Rulindo), not sourced from a real meteorological dataset. This file is not currently read by any loader in backend/ — services/risk_scorer.py keeps its own copy of these same illustrative values inline (see WEATHER_PROFILES). Kept here, updated to match, for consistency in case a future pass wires up a file-based loader.
